message:
refactor(contracts): tighten ABC-CHN-001 to classify transitional channel helpers as migration-only seams

Rework the ABC-CHN-001 channel boundary contract to explicitly distinguish
canonical runtime_compat primitives from five transitional helper APIs
(mpsc_send, mpsc_recv_option, watch_has_changed, watch_borrow_and_update_clone,
watch_changed). The contract invariant now classifies these helpers as
migration-only seams rather than part of the canonical contract surface.

Add three cross-cutting tests to lock in this distinction:
- channel_contract_marks_transitional_helpers_non_canonical
- channel_helper_mappings_remain_transitional
- transitional_channel_helpers_match_contract_alignment_state

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
